title: Hardcoded 915MHz frequency violates regional regulations
description: Location: lora_l2.c:271-279. The LoRa config hardcodes .frequency = 915000000 (US ISM band). Devices in EU (868MHz), Japan (920MHz), or other regions would violate local RF regulations. This will generate user issue reports from non-US users. Either make frequency configurable via Kconfig or document that this code only supports US region.
close_reason: Fixed: replaced hardcoded 915MHz with CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_FREQUENCY Kconfig option (default 915000000 Hz)
